name: Billy
inventory: Priest's Pack (backpack, blanket, candles x10, tinderbox, rations x2, waterskin)
features: Breath Weapon (Lightning, 5x30 ft line, DEX save, 2d6 damage)
backstory:
Billy was abandoned as a hatchling on the steps of a seaside temple dedicated to Eldath, goddess of peace. The monks who raised him never learned where he came from — only that storms rolled in the night he arrived, and lightning struck the temple bell tower without leaving a mark. He grew up slow to read but quick to listen, finding wisdom in the silence between prayers rather than in dusty texts.

When coastal raids began devastating nearby fishing villages, Billy heard a voice in the thunder — not words exactly, but a pull, a calling. He took up a mace, donned the temple's old scale mail, and walked out into the storm. He may not know much about the world beyond his temple walls, but he knows that the innocent need protecting, and that the lightning in his blood was given for a reason.
